raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Cybercrime is on the rise across the country, with public schools becoming targets of sophisticated attacks that capture sensitive data.",
    "Current law fails to offer adequate support for school districts and county offices of education to defend against cyberthreats.",
    "AB 1023 would require state agencies to provide direct cybersecurity assistance to K-12 schools in California.",
    "Ransomware attacks have grown in recent years, with schools increasingly identified as soft targets lacking cybersecurity defenses.",
    "In 2022, cyberattacks against the education sector increased by 36 percent from the previous year.",
    "It is a matter of when, not if, local educational agencies will experience a cybersecurity attack on their information systems.",
    "The Glenn County Office of Education suffered an attack that led to a multiple-day closure of supported school districts, which paid a ransom to recover sensitive data.",
    "Education technology departments in schools are often understaffed and have limited resources to combat cyber threats."
  ]
}
```
